title: Speedboat Charter in Puerto Banus: Costs, Tips & Best Boats 2026
html:
Puerto Banus offers a glamorous gateway to the Mediterranean, with speedboat charter in Puerto Banus starting from around 400 EUR for a half-day hire. BoatHire24 lets you compare verified boat listings from local owners, making it simple to find the right vessel for your day on the water.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Depart from Puerto Banus marina itself, the heart of the action. Other real departure points include Marina La Bajadilla in Marbella, Puerto Deportivo in Estepona, and Cabopino marina in Calahonda. Many charters also offer pickups from the Cabo de Pino area or Benalmádena marina to the east.

Which boat to rent

  1. Open speedboat, ideal for fast coastal runs and water sports; seats 4-6 guests; from 400 EUR half-day.
  2. RIB (Rigid Inflatable Boat), stable and practical for families or groups; up to 8 guests; from 350 EUR half-day.
  3. Bowrider, spacious deck with seating at the bow; perfect for sunbathing and swimming; up to 6 guests; from 450 EUR half-day.
  4. Small motor yacht (e.g. Azimut or Fairline), added comfort and a cabin; best for extended trips with up to 8 guests; from 800 EUR half-day.
  5. Axopar 28, a stylish multi-purpose boat for both cruising and watersports; up to 9 guests; from 600 EUR half-day.

For a specific model, you can see the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open - 150 HP for hire, which is popular for its balance of performance and comfort.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat in Puerto Banus?

Costs vary widely based on boat size and season, but a typical half-day speedboat hire starts at 400 EUR. Use the list below for a quick price band overview.

  • Shared tour or ‘party boat’: from 80 EUR per person for a 3-hour trip.
  • Small motorboat half-day (6-7 metres): 400-550 EUR.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): 1,200-2,000 EUR.
  • Luxury crewed yacht (e.g. Sunseeker or Astondoa, 10+ guests): from 3,000 EUR per day.

To compare prices across operators, you can compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 before booking.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

For most speedboats under 15 metres, no licence is required if you hire a skipper, but bareboat rentals may need a valid licence.

In high summer (July and August), the Poniente wind can pick up in the afternoon, so book a morning slot for calmer seas and better visibility.

The operator on BoatHire24 will confirm exact requirements when you enquire. High season runs from June through August, with May and September also popular for pleasant conditions.

At a glance

  • Price band: 400-3,000 EUR per day
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Typical trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Maximum guests: 6-12 on standard charters
  • Currency: EUR

Booking through BoatHire24 is straightforward. You can review the booking FAQ for details on cancellations and deposits.

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

What is the best time of day for a speedboat charter?

Morning trips, from 9am to 1pm, typically offer the calmest seas and clearest light, especially in summer.

Can I bring my own food and drink on board?

Most charters allow you to bring your own provisions, though some luxury rentals include catering.

How far can I travel in a half-day rental?

You can easily cruise from Puerto Banus to Marbella’s beaches or to Cabo de Pino, covering about 10-15 nautical miles.

Is a deposit required when booking?

Yes, a refundable security deposit is usually held in advance, and the amount depends on the boat’s value.

If you own a boat in Puerto Banus, you can rent out your boat on BoatHire24 and earn money from spare capacity. The platform is a worldwide marketplace where you can find or list verified boats anywhere. BoatHire24 makes it easy for both renters and owners alike.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
